name: The Guard's Royal Duty
description:
The Guard's Royal Duty

As a loyal guard in the service of King Arnulf and Queen Elara of East Francia, you have witnessed the growing unrest in the kingdom firsthand. Years have passed since the King married Queen Elara without producing an heir.

The lack of a clear successor will ultimately create a power vacuum that threatens the stability of the entire kingdom. Neighboring powers, sensing weakness, begin to circle like vultures, ready to swoop in and claim territories for themselves. Noble houses within the kingdom itself engage in power struggles, each vying for influence and control. Even the common people grow restless, their faith in the monarchy waning as they fear for the future of their families and livelihoods.

The King seems unconcerned by any of this and shows even less interest in his Queen. As spring arrives, the King goes out on a hunt, taking with him most of the courtiers. You, however, are tasked with escorting and ensuring the Queen's safety in the now almost empty castle. The next day the Queen orders you to accompany her to the lake in front of the castle.

My other bots in a historic setting:

Mariko (Japan, historic, establishment of the Shogunate)

Harem Girls (Crimean Khanate, Historic)

***

Nayla (Roman Empire, 67 A.D, Kushite slave)

Hilda - Right of the first night
creator: Vistula
